events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the staged overcurrent device package matches the drawing's size/rating/application and stock is clean/intact with no defects, the decision is **pass** with **low** risk — but I flagged follow-up verification items (110.14(C) termination temp matching, 210.8/210.12 GFCI/AFCI protection, torque values, coordination re-check) as required actions before energization, since those can't be confirmed until termination actually occurs.
